payload.answer: Sam no longer works at Goldman; the newer information says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72, so Point72 should be treated as current and Goldman as former.
citations: Existing memory: Sam works at Goldman.
New: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.
payload.decision: Supersede the prior memory that Sam works at Goldman. Record the new fact that Sam left Goldman and joined Point72 as the current state, while retaining Goldman only as a former employer.

entity_resolution.reason: No new entity needs resolution; the conflict is about Sam's employment history, not identity.

payload.intent: Resolve a job-history conflict by treating the older employer as superseded and preserving the updated current employer with temporal ambiguity noted.

memory_cards.statement: Sam previously worked at Goldman, but that employment is superseded by a later update indicating Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.
Sam is currently at Point72, based on the newer update.

details: Detected direct contradiction on current employer.
Applied supersession in favor of newer statement.

repair_options: Replace the current employer memory with Point72.
Optionally retain Goldman only as a former employer with temporal qualification.
If timing matters, mark the move as occurring sometime after the Goldman employment record.

Record the new fact that Sam left Goldman and joined Point72 as the current state, while retaining Goldman only as a former employer.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"supersession","statement":"Sam previously worked at Goldman, but that employment is superseded by a later update indicating Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.","confidence":"medium","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"former employer"},{"name":"Point72","type":"organization","role":"current employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"formerly worked at","object":"Goldman"},{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"joined","object":"Point72"},{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"left","object":"Goldman"}]},{"kind":"current_fact","statement":"Sam is currently at Point72, based on the newer update.","confidence":"medium","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Point72","type":"organization","role":"current employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"works at","object":"Point72"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"no_merge","entity_id":null,"reason":"No new entity needs resolution; the conflict is about Sam's employment history, not identity."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"Sam no longer works at Goldman; the newer information says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72, so Point72 should be treated as current and Goldman as former.","citations":["Existing memory: Sam works at Goldman.","New: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72."],"repair_options":["Replace the current employer memory with Point72.","Optionally retain Goldman only as a former employer with temporal qualification.","If timing matters, mark the move as occurring sometime after the Goldman employment record."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Detected direct contradiction on current employer.","Applied supersession in favor of newer statement.","Avoided presenting Goldman as current."]}}
